articles.title: [Hollinger] Summer League standouts: Kaluma
articles.original_title: [Hollinger] Summer League standouts: Kaluma
articles.summary: "Arthur Kaluma, Lakers Of all the unsigned veteran players at summer league, Kaluma stood out the most. Scouts have been on the 24-year-old Kaluma since his sophomore year at Creighton. He has the size and athleticism teams crave at the small forward spot and has a killer shot fake. Unfortunately, his feel for the game and shooting touch have never caught up to his physical tools.  That may be changing: Kaluma was one of South Bay’s better players a year ago and had a dominant summer-league
